calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: MITCHELL WONG, Esq. specially appeared for the plaintiff. Per plaintiff request, the court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Code, Code of Civil Procedure - CCP 664.6. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: D. Diaz; Not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2025 Continued To Sep-16-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Mitchell Wong, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff and Theresia Samadham, Esq., specially appearing for the defendant. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to September 16, 2025, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2025 Continued To Jun-17-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff and Mitchell Wong, Esq., specially appearing for the defendant. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to June 17, 2025, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2025 Continued To Apr-15-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to April 15, 2025 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610).
